# Forge Timer

Forge Timer is a free web-based gamified Pomodoro timer for focused work, study sessions, breaks, notes, streaks, analytics, and account-based cloud sync.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://forgetimer.dev/)
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://forgetimer.dev/pomodoro-timer/)
- [Focus Timer](https://forgetimer.dev/focus-timer/)
- [Study Timer](https://forgetimer.dev/study-timer/)
- [AI summary](https://forgetimer.dev/ai/forge-timer.md)

## Facts

- Forge Timer is a free web app for English-speaking global users.
- The app includes focus and break timers with editable durations.
- Guests can use the timer locally without an account.
- Signed-in users can use notes, analytics, streak tracking, progress tracking, and cloud sync.
- Forge Timer is designed for Pomodoro-style work sessions, deep work, and study routines.
- This llms.txt file is an experimental convention for AI agents and is not required by Google Search.
